name: Chinese Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh ginger root, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumbers.
2. Slice them thinly.
3. In a bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients: soy sauce, rice wine vinegar, sugar, sesame oil, scallions, and ginger.
4. Pour the mixture over the sliced cucumbers.
5. Stir gently to ensure even coating.
6. Chill until ready to serve.
